acceptance_checks: Miss extraction emits eligible-only JSONL outputs
Run comparison hard-fails on fixture mismatch
The run command composes the default end-to-end non-mutating lifecycle path
constraints: Do not call lifecycle materialization endpoints in the default run flow.
Compare runs by stable case_id only after fixture digest and case count match.

definition_of_done.behavior_outcome: The harness emits reusable corrective exports and deterministic comparison artifacts without mutating lifecycle state.
definition_of_done.rollback_or_fallback: If judged inputs are incomplete or incompatible, stop with explicit reasons rather than emitting misleading exports or comparisons.
definition_of_done.verifier_acceptance_condition: Verifier can trace eligible misses and comparison deltas from the stored artifacts.

fallback_or_rollback: Keep miss export and comparison explicit and fail closed on incomplete judged inputs.
primary_behavior: Implement miss extraction, deterministic run comparison, and the composed run command surface.
